section_name: Operation on Property of Subdivision or Condominium
chapter_title: Operation of Bicycles & Mopeds, Golf Carts, and Other Low-powered Vehicles
text:
(a) In this section:

(1) “Condominium” has the meaning assigned by Section 82.003 (Definitions) , Property Code.

(2) “Declaration” has the meaning assigned by Section 82.003 (Definitions) , Property Code.

(3) “Property owners’ association” has the meaning assigned by Section 202.001 (Definitions) , Property Code.

(4) “Restrictions” has the meaning assigned by Section 209.002 (Definitions) , Property Code.

(5) “Subdivision” has the meaning assigned by Section 209.002 (Definitions) , Property Code.

(b) A property owners’ association may adopt reasonable safety and use rules for the operation, for the purpose of picking up or delivering mail, parcels, or packages, of a vehicle bearing license plates issued under Section 551.452 (License Plates for Package Delivery Vehicles) on the property of a subdivision or condominium managed or regulated by the association.

(c) A motor carrier may operate, for the purpose of picking up or delivering mail, parcels, or packages, a vehicle bearing license plates issued under Section 551.452 (License Plates for Package Delivery Vehicles) on the property of a subdivision subject to restrictions or a condominium that has in place a declaration, in a manner that complies with any applicable rules adopted by a property owners’ association that manages or regulates the subdivision or condominium.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 551. Operation of Bicycles & Mopeds, Golf Carts, and Other Low-powered Vehicles
##### § 551.454 — Operation on Property of Subdivision or Condominium

(a) In this section:

    (1) “Condominium” has the meaning assigned by Section 82.003 (Definitions) , Property Code.

    (2) “Declaration” has the meaning assigned by Section 82.003 (Definitions) , Property Code.

    (3) “Property owners’ association” has the meaning assigned by Section 202.001 (Definitions) , Property Code.

    (4) “Restrictions” has the meaning assigned by Section 209.002 (Definitions) , Property Code.

    (5) “Subdivision” has the meaning assigned by Section 209.002 (Definitions) , Property Code.

(b) A property owners’ association may adopt reasonable safety and use rules for the operation, for the purpose of picking up or delivering mail, parcels, or packages, of a vehicle bearing license plates issued under Section 551.452 (License Plates for Package Delivery Vehicles) on the property of a subdivision or condominium managed or regulated by the association.

(c) A motor carrier may operate, for the purpose of picking up or delivering mail, parcels, or packages, a vehicle bearing license plates issued under Section 551.452 (License Plates for Package Delivery Vehicles) on the property of a subdivision subject to restrictions or a condominium that has in place a declaration, in a manner that complies with any applicable rules adopted by a property owners’ association that manages or regulates the subdivision or condominium.

*Added by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 119 (H.B.561), Sec. 1, eff. May 26, 2017.*

subsections.text: “Condominium” has the meaning assigned by Section 82.003 (Definitions) , Property Code.
“Declaration” has the meaning assigned by Section 82.003 (Definitions) , Property Code.
“Property owners’ association” has the meaning assigned by Section 202.001 (Definitions) , Property Code.
“Restrictions” has the meaning assigned by Section 209.002 (Definitions) , Property Code.
“Subdivision” has the meaning assigned by Section 209.002 (Definitions) , Property Code.
